title: neottia japonica
intro: Neottia japonica, also known as the Japanese tooth-awned orchid or Japanese tooth-awled orchid, is a type of flowering orchid native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Neottia japonica include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Neottia japonica is often prepared as a decoction or powder, and is also used in herbal infusions and teas to harness its medicinal properties.
